articles.author: Omar Sohail
articles.title: Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro To Be Out Of Reach For Many Of Qualcomm’s Partners, As 2nm Process Will Shoot Prices To Abnormal Levels - Wccftech
articles.description: Qualcomm’s Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro will adopt TSMC’s 2nm this year, but this move could also make it the most expensive SoC to date
articles.content: The shift to TSMCs 2nm process will make Qualcomm more competitive against Apple, but the biggest drawback is that the companys chipsets are going to be astronomically expensive. Looking at the Snapd… [+2289 chars]
